brief_summary: Four-panel numbered process strip walking through the buying decision path in order: name the problem, split or monoblock, kit/prebuilt/sculpted, budget the relearning weeks. Panel copy is drawn directly from the four numbered steps described in the article's 'How to actually choose' section.

split-ergo-buyers-guide.mdx § 'How to actually choose' — 'self-reported transition accounts converge on roughly two weeks before things feel normal again'
